overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a continuous walk through Night City. The player character moves from a narrow, hazy alley between towering buildings into open sunlit streets with dense neon signage, pedestrians, and futuristic architecture. The atmosphere transitions from enclosed and moody to vibrant commercial districts with dynamic lighting and vertical cityscapes.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley between high-rise buildings

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow alleyway toward the bright exit ahead

entered.detail: tall concrete building wall with weathered texture and architectural details
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on the building wall
raised concrete planter containing a small tree or large shrub
concrete tile ground with scattered debris and papers
bright hazy light visible at the end of the narrow passage indicating the exit

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow enclosed alleyway between towering buildings. The camera moves forward through the hazy corridor with concrete walls on both sides, passing a digital billboard and a planter with greenery. The ground is littered with papers and debris. No pedestrians or vehicles are present, creating a secluded atmosphere as the player approaches the bright exit ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: major urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: exits the narrow alley into a wide open sunlit intersection with tall skyscrapers
lighting shifts from dim hazy shade to bright direct sunlight as the camera emerges from the alley

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection through the marked crosswalk with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab waiting at the traffic light near the crosswalk

entered.detail: massive modern glass and steel tower rising into the hazy sky
tall palm tree visible against the bright sky between buildings
overhead traffic light structure spanning across the intersection
yellow and white painted pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
distinctive building with red horizontal accent stripes and teal base

segments.scene_description: The player emerges from the alley into a bright, open urban intersection. The scene transitions dramatically from enclosed to expansive, with towering glass skyscrapers visible through the haze. The camera crosses the street through a marked crosswalk, navigating around scattered pedestrians. A yellow taxi waits at the traffic light while the player moves toward the building with distinctive red horizontal stripes.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial boulevard with storefronts and neon signage

events.description: turns right to follow the sidewalk along the commercial street

agents.ego_description: walking along the busy sidewalk past various shops and digital advertisements

entered.detail: bright orange and blue illuminated sign for a convenience store
cluster of colorful neon signs advertising various businesses
line of parked vehicles along the curb including sedans and futuristic cars
large three-dimensional holographic display showing a green-tinted advertisement

segments.scene_description: Walking along a commercial boulevard, the player moves past storefronts with bright neon signage including a prominent 24/7 store. The sidewalk is populated with pedestrians walking in opposing directions. Parked cars line the left side of the street while holographic advertisements and digital billboards illuminate the scene. The architecture features a mix of commercial buildings with various facade treatments.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow neon-lit commercial canyon with overhead walkways

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the tops of the towering buildings and overhead structures
exits the narrow neon alley back into a wider open intersection

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow neon street while looking up at the architecture and continuing through to the open area

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead into the narrow street

entered.detail: concentrated cluster of pink, blue, and purple neon signs covering building facades
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings above the street level
vertical canyon formed by extremely tall skyscrapers on both sides of the narrow street
blue sedan parked or moving slowly near the intersection exit

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow commercial canyon densely packed with neon signage in vibrant pinks, blues, and purples. The camera tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers converging overhead with an elevated walkway connecting the buildings. After admiring the vertical architecture, the player continues through the narrow passage and exits back into a wider intersection with vehicles and pedestrians, completing the journey through this cyberpunk cityscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a secluded, hazy alleyway into the expansive brightness of a bustling urban intersection. It begins by gliding through a narrow concrete corridor flanked by towering buildings, passing a digital billboard and scattered debris in a quiet, enclosed atmosphere. As the camera approaches the light at the end of the passage, the scene opens dramatically into a wide city street where the oppressive walls give way to towering glass skyscrapers. The movement then carries the viewer across a marked crosswalk, navigating through a crowd of pedestrians and past a waiting yellow taxi before finally heading toward a building marked by distinctive red horizontal stripes.

The shot follows a continuous journey along a bustling commercial boulevard that narrows into a dense neon canyon before opening back into a wide city intersection. It begins by moving past bright storefronts and a prominent 24/7 store, weaving through crowds of pedestrians while holographic advertisements and parked cars line the street. As the path tightens, the scene shifts into a narrow passage saturated with vibrant pink, blue, and purple neon signage. The camera tilts upward to reveal towering skyscrapers and an elevated walkway converging overhead before descending to continue through the corridor. Finally, the environment expands once more as the camera exits the canyon and emerges into a broad intersection filled with flowing vehicle traffic and pedestrians.
